preferences.subtitle: Choose the interface language and light or dark appearance.

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

language.label: Preferred language
language.info: Changing this updates the app UI and the default language for NEW projects. Existing projects and their generated ERPs keep the language they were created with.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
danger.confirmPrompt: Enter your account email exactly as shown above to confirm.
